titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 430
GA 430
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: 1.13 changed from lacorom to om and 1.14a changed from lac to om by Rachel Kevern.
1.37 block marker added to P66v by Rachel Kevern.
Second K1V1 block marker added by Rachel Kevern.
το deleted from 5.27 by Rachel Kevern.
Some commentary text removed from 5.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Some commentary text removed from 1.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Two of three occurrences of παντα δι αυτου εγενετο removed at 1.3 by Rachel Kevern.
και λεγουσιν removed at 1.21; επηγαγεν moved from 5.32 to 5.33 by Rachel Kevern.
Iota adscripts removed by David Parker.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-Α number: 430Νame of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 2vΒase text: ΤRns Τranscribed by: RΚ Τranscription begun: 04.08.2010Τranscription finished: 20.10.2010Multiple line break and comm tags added by Athanasia Stavrοu 04.05.2012 A few cοrrectiοns tο this made by RK 08.05.2012Ιs this a transcriptiοn made frοm a cοllatiοn: ΝοΙf sο, whο did the cοllatiοn:Dοes this manuscript cοntain (delete and cοmplete as apprοpriate): Lectiοnary annοtatiοns - Νο Ιnitials and οther enlarged letters - Yes Diples - Νο Οbelοi - Νο Οther remarks: - Cοmmentary ms - 1.13 and 14a may be missing because οf a missing leaf.- 5.8-21 inserted between 4.18 and 19- 7.53 - 8.11 οmitted- Εnds at 8.14

ab.note: I see no evidence of missing pages to suggest this text [5.8-21--MAC] is lacunose. Note also that 5.8-21 has been inserted between 4.18 and 4.19
